funk.name: Root-5 Slap
funk.description: Classic funk slap: root on 1, ghost note on e, 5th on 3. Thumb down on roots (T), pop on 5ths (P).

funk.name: 16th Note Groove
funk.description: Syncopated 16ths. Root on 1, octave on the & of 2. Keep it tight.

blues.name: Shuffle Walk
blues.description: Walking bass line with shuffle feel. Root, 3rd, 5th, 6th.

rock.name: Root Octave Pump
rock.description: Power root on downbeats, octave fills. Lock with kick drum.
rock.feel: Eighth notes, drive, lock with kick

bossa.name: Bossa Two-Feel
bossa.description: Root on 1, 5th on 3. Simple, melodic, in service of the harmony.

jazz.name: Walking Line
jazz.description: Chromatic approach to each chord. Step-wise motion, quarter notes.
